hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Discover our journey toward achieving sustainable development

intro.title: About the Foundation
intro.description: The Diyala River Foundation for Sustainable Development is a non-governmental organization dedicated to achieving the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) in Iraq through comprehensive development initiatives. We believe that global change starts with local steps — that's why we work side-by-side with local communities to empower youth and women, promote peace, and protect the environment.
intro.visionText: A sustainable society with equal opportunities and a clean environment, governed by peace and cooperation.
intro.missionText: Empowering local communities through development initiatives focused on youth, women, and the environment, in order to create lasting positive impact in accordance with the United Nations' goals.

sdgFocus.title: Our Commitment to the SDGs
sdgFocus.description: We localize global goals and implement them with local hands, focusing on the following goals:

4.title: Quality Education
4.description: Ensure inclusive and equitable quality education and promote lifelong learning opportunities for all.

5.title: Gender Equality
5.description: Achieve gender equality and empower all women and girls.

8.title: Decent Work & Economic Growth
8.description: Promote sustained, inclusive and sustainable economic growth, full and productive employment and decent work for all.

13.title: Climate Action
13.description: Take urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts.

16.title: Peace, Justice & Strong Institutions
16.description: Promote peaceful and inclusive societies for sustainable development.

17.title: Partnerships for the Goals
17.description: Strengthen the means of implementation and revitalize the global partnership for sustainable development.

impact.title: Our Impact in Numbers
impact.description: We believe real impact is measured by tangible results on the ground.

team.title: Leadership Team
team.description: A group of local experts leading the journey of development and change.

history.title: Milestones
history.description: Key achievements of our affiliated teams (Diyala Women & Youth for Peace and Women Are Dreaming) and their community initiatives.

timeline.title: Peace Streets Initiative
timeline.description: Cleaning, painting, and planting 5 streets in Baquba city and naming them after 5 Iraqi governorates to promote national unity — carried out by the Diyala Youth for Peace team, supported by UNDP and Hawa' Organization, in collaboration with security forces and civil defense.

timeline.title: Peace Halls Initiative
timeline.description: Rehabilitating three sports halls in Diyala Governorate — including one used by champions with disabilities — by the Diyala Youth for Peace team, supported by UNDP and Hawa' Organization.

timeline.title: Peace Workshop
timeline.description: Training 25 women (widows, divorcees, and wives of prisoners) in pattern-making and fashion design over 6 days by the Diyala Women for Peace team, with 10 selected for permanent work in a workshop affiliated with the Rahma Youth Forum.

timeline.title: Peace Podcast
timeline.description: Launching podcast episodes focused on peacebuilding and social cohesion, initiated by the Diyala Women for Peace team to raise awareness and share positive stories.

testimonials.title: Partners in Success
testimonials.description: What our partners and beneficiaries say about our initiatives.

form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: Your testimonial has been submitted successfully. It will be reviewed by our team shortly.

teams.title: Teams' Field Activities
teams.description: Tangible results achieved by the Diyala Women & Youth for Peace team and Women Are Dreaming team in 2024, supported by UNDP.

peaceStreets.title: Peace Streets
peaceStreets.description: Cleaning, painting, and planting 5 streets in Baquba and naming them after 5 Iraqi governorates to promote unity — in partnership with security forces, civil defense, and municipality.

peaceHalls.title: Peace Halls
peaceHalls.description: Rehabilitating 3 sports halls in Diyala — including one used by champions with disabilities. Members from the Anbar Youth for Peace team also participated.

peaceWorkshop.title: Peace Workshop
peaceWorkshop.description: Training 25 women (widows, divorcees, wives of prisoners) in pattern-making and design for 6 days. 10 selected for permanent work in the Rahma Youth Forum workshop.

peacePodcast.title: Peace Podcast
peacePodcast.description: Podcast episodes focused on peacebuilding, social cohesion, and community integration through empowerment and self-development.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clarity and honesty in all our work and projects.

empowerment.title: Empowerment
empowerment.description: Empowering individuals and communities to reach their full potential.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Ensuring our solutions are long-term and environmentally friendly.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Working with partners and the local community to achieve our shared goals.
